## Summary
The code review of src/order_validation.py and tests/test_order_validation.py found several areas for improvement, including the need for type checks and improved error messages.

## Performance Observations
None found.

## Edge Cases
None found.

## Security & Correctness Issues
None found.

## Architectural Suggestions
In src/order_validation.py, the validate_order function has a nested if-else structure that can be simplified. The error messages for missing customer id and missing items can be improved for better clarity. The function is also missing type checks for the 'items' and 'shipping_address' values.

## Validation Outcome
The run_validation_suite function returned an exit code of 0, indicating that the validation was successful. The STDOUT shows that all 3 test cases passed. The STDERR is empty, indicating no errors.
